primary.LOGIN_ERROR: {username} encountered an error while logging in.
primary.LOGIN_SUCCESS: {username} has logged in to this app.
primary.PASSWORD_CHANGE_ERROR: {username} encountered an error while changing their password (before changing their password).
primary.PASSWORD_CHANGED: {username} has changed their password to a new password.
primary.VERIFICATION_REQUEST: {username} wants to verify their email address.
primary.VERIFICATION_ERROR: {username} encountered an error while verifying their email address.
primary.REGISTRATION_ERROR: {username} encountered an error while signing up.
primary.LOGOUT: {username} has logged out of this app.
primary.OAUTH_SIGNIN: {username} has signed in to this app using a different method.
primary.COVER_LETTER_DELETED: {username} has deleted the specified cover letter.
primary.COVER_LETTER_CREATED: {username} has created a new cover letter.
primary.COVER_LETTER_UPDATED: {username} has updated the specified cover letter.
primary.CV_PAGE_VIEWED: {username} has viewed the resume's general information.
primary.AI_ERROR: An error occurred while generating {username} using AI.
primary.AI_EXPERIENCE_GENERATED: {username} generated a work experience using AI.
primary.AI_COVER_LETTER_GENERATED: {username} generated a cover letter using AI.
primary.CONTACT_FORM_SUBMISSION_ERROR: {username} encountered an error while sending a message.

TWO_FACTOR_UPDATED.text: {username} has {status} two-step verification the next time they sign in.

primary.EMAIL_CHANGE_REQUEST: {username} wants to change his/her email address.
primary.VALIDATION_ERROR: {username} attempted to perform the action without validating.
primary.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: {username} is attempting this action too often.
primary.ACTION_ERROR: {username} encountered an error while performing an action.
primary.UNAUTHORIZED: {username} attempted to perform an action without being logged in.
primary.NO_ADMIN_ACCESS: {username} attempted to use administrator actions without permission.

secondary.unauthorized: IP: {ip}, Page where the error occurred: {route}
